Red Teaming

We go beyond technical testing to simulate real adversaries. How well does your organization detect and respond to an attack?

What It Covers

  • Full-scope attack simulations
  • Multiple attack vectors (technical, social, physical)
  • Detection and response testing
  • Blue team evaluation
  • Incident response assessment

Our Approach

Red teaming is about realism. We don't just tick boxes—we act like actual attackers. We'll use whatever means necessary (within scope) to achieve our objectives and see if your defenses catch us.

Deliverables

  • After-action report
  • Timeline of attacker activities
  • Detection gaps identified
  • Response improvement recommendations
  • Executive briefing

Typical Timeline

Red team engagements typically run 2-4 weeks, depending on scope and objectives.

What You'll Need

  • Clear objectives and rules of engagement
  • Point of contact for coordination
  • Defined scope and boundaries
Request a Quote
